hello.text: The north wall guards are burning through gear faster than I can mend it. Test those wraps outside the gate.

forge.text: Aetherwake does not need heroes yet. It needs steady hands that come back with everyone still breathing.

hello.text: The ember burns do not spread if you cool them fast. Keep potions ready before you cross the north gate.
The old ward-stone sleeps beneath our well. When it hums, creatures beyond the wall answer.

warning.text: Defend the wall, but listen to the town first. Shops, people, and wells all remember different parts of the same warning.

hello.text: I saw ember eyes past the training ring. They stopped when the well rang, like they were waiting for a name.
